context_window_budget.note: Every enabled MCP adds tool count. 200k context becomes ~70k with too many tools. Keep under 10 enabled per session, under 80 active tools total.
context_window_budget.rule: List all servers here. Mark default_enabled carefully. Disable per-project in harness config.

servers.name: kotadb
servers.description: Code index — symbols, dependencies, AST, embeddings

servers.name: dev-brain
servers.description: Dev intelligence — todos, threads, thoughts, workspace state
servers.note: HTTP MCP — shared across all harnesses

servers.name: executor
servers.description: Universal primitive runtime — sole MCP gateway. All brain-layer tools (anima, devbrain, kotadb, subagent) accessed through here. Tools: execute, resume.

brain_layers.anima: tools["anima.*"] — identity, memory, synthesis (port 3098, internal only)
brain_layers.devbrain: tools["devbrain.*"] — todos, threads, workspace state (port 3097, internal only)

servers.note: Executor is the ONLY harness-registered MCP. All other MCP servers are internal brain-layer sources, not directly registered in any harness config.

servers.name: subagent-mcp
servers.description: Subagent delegation — invoke reviewer, test-writer, architect, debugger, sigil-distiller via model API

project_scoped.name: HubSpotDev
project_scoped.description: HubSpot CRM integration — owners, contacts, deals, pipelines. Bento-only.
project_scoped.note: Project-scoped — only available when working in the bento directory

port_allocation.3098: anima MCP HTTP — internal brain-layer source only. Not registered in any harness. Access via executor tools["anima.*"]
port_allocation.3096: subagent-mcp MCP HTTP — http://127.0.0.1:3096 — label: dev.brain.subagent-mcp

gateway_policy.rule: Executor (port 8000) is the ONLY MCP registered in any harness config. All other ports are internal brain-layer sources accessed exclusively through executor.
gateway_policy.direct_registration: FORBIDDEN for anima, devbrain, kotadb, subagent-mcp in any harness config
